messages.loadError: The dashboard could not be loaded correctly. Check the connection and the assigned permissions.

hero.title: ADM dashboard
hero.description: Track shops, tenants and royalties for the scope authorized by your profile.

tenant.title: Tenant dashboard
tenant.description: Manage your shops, monitor turnover and keep a clear view of your royalties.
tenant.shopsSubtitle: Active contracts and points of sale linked to your account.
tenant.noShops: No active shop is linked to your account.
tenant.performanceSubtitle: Sales and royalty summary over the selected period.
tenant.noPerformanceText: No sale or royalty is available over the selected period.

boutique.title: Shop dashboard
boutique.description: Track your shop's sales, stock and royalties over the selected period.

vendeur.title: Cashier dashboard
vendeur.description: A simple overview of today's activity to start checking out quickly.
vendeur.ctaText: Open the cash register to start a new sale.
vendeur.recentSalesSubtitle: Tickets recorded over the filtered period.
vendeur.noSalesText: Open the cash register to record your first sale of the day.

royaltyByGroup.title: Royalty by article group
royaltyByGroup.subtitle: Effective rate applied (royalty rules, product rate or default rate) over the selected period.
royaltyByGroup.emptyText: No validated sale generates a royalty on this scope.

shopSales.title: Turnover by shop
shopSales.subtitle: Point of sale performance over the period.

topProducts.title: Top products
topProducts.subtitle: Best real sales over the selected period.

stockAlerts.title: Stock alerts
stockAlerts.subtitle: Products detected below threshold by supervision endpoints.
stockAlerts.emptyText: No visible product is currently below the alert threshold.

empty.noSalesText: Adjust filters or check your viewing permissions.
empty.noRanking: No data to rank for this period.
empty.noTopProducts: No product sold over this period.

guest.title: Supervise your shops, sales, stock and royalties in one interface.
guest.description: Sign in to access the management dashboard and steering screens.
